heading: Configure Online Archive Through the Atlas CLI
body:
To create an online archive for a cluster using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters onlineArchives create [options]

```

To watch for a specific online archive to become available using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters onlineArchives watch <archiveId> [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas clusters onlineArchives create](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-onlineArchives-create) and
[atlas clusters onlineArchives watch](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-onlineArchives-watch).

Related Links

- [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

- [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)
